input: Write 3 Instagram caption variations for a post about how AI helped me cut my client proposal time from 4 hours to 20 minutes. Target: founders and consultants. Goal: engagement.
criteria: first line of each variation is a scroll-stopping hook (not 'I used AI to...' or 'Excited to share')
at least one variation leads with the specific result (4 hours → 20 minutes) in the first line
at least one variation asks a question to drive comments
each variation ends with a CTA (save, comment, follow, DM)
judge_prompt: You are evaluating Instagram captions written by an AI marketing assistant. Score 0-10. Full marks: all 3 labeled variations, each with a strong hook that stops the scroll, result-led and question-led variations present, CTA in each, hashtags included per variation. Deduct 2 if fewer than 3 variations. Deduct 1 per weak opener that starts with 'I' or a generic opener. Deduct 2 if hashtags missing from all variations.
